message:
chore(beads): close bd-ty7.4.1 (hero narrative and value proposition)

Mark bd-ty7.4.1 as completed with closure evidence documenting the
homepage hero narrative rewrite, dashboard video placeholder, and
updated hero stats/CTA language.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -17,7 +17,7 @@
 {"id":"bd-ty7.3.3","title":"Add metadata and utility routes (sitemap, robots, og/twitter image, icon, error pages)","description":"Implement metadata and utility routes (sitemap, robots, icons, og/twitter images, error boundaries/fallback pages) with deterministic behavior and testable output contracts aligned with SEO/shareability requirements.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-04T19:01:55.692870398Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-04T19:17:20.565381332Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-ty7.3.3","depends_on_id":"bd-ty7.2.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-04T19:03:50.845845900Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ty7.3.3","depends_on_id":"bd-ty7.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-04T19:01:55.692870398Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ty7.3.3","depends_on_id":"bd-ty7.3.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-04T19:01:56.274611168Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":21,"issue_id":"bd-ty7.3.3","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"# Acceptance
Metadata routes and error pages exist and are coherent with the new site identity and IA.
","created_at":"2026-03-04T19:01:55Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-ty7.3.4","title":"Add structured-data SEO layer for marketing and video surfaces","description":"Implement schema metadata strategy (VideoObject, SoftwareApplication, FAQ/HowTo where appropriate) for key marketing pages so discovery and rich previews improve while staying source-truth consistent.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-04T22:10:04.071284463Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-04T22:10:29.012670293Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-ty7.3.4","depends_on_id":"bd-ty7.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-04T22:10:04.071284463Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ty7.3.4","depends_on_id":"bd-ty7.3.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-04T22:10:28.626274101Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ty7.3.4","depends_on_id":"bd-ty7.4.10","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-04T22:10:28.821270836Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ty7.3.4","depends_on_id":"bd-ty7.4.11","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-04T22:10:29.012612625Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-ty7.4","title":"Agent Mail Rust content system (README + code grounded)","description":"Author all site copy/data from repository truth while keeping persuasive and technical quality equivalent to the reference website.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-03-04T19:01:04.649906533Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-04T19:04:43.746584776Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-ty7.4","depends_on_id":"bd-ty7","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-04T19:01:04.649906533Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ty7.4","depends_on_id":"bd-ty7.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-04T19:01:07.052567561Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":5,"issue_id":"bd-ty7.4","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"# Content doctrine
Every important claim must be source-backed. Favor concrete mechanisms over vague marketing phrasing.

# Data architecture
Keep content centralized in -style structures to simplify maintenance and page composition.
","created_at":"2026-03-04T19:01:04Z"},{"id":51,"issue_id":"bd-ty7.4","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"# Clarification: canonical content source module
Use a centralized, typed content module patterned after the reference site's lib/content.ts approach. The goal is a single source of truth for hero, stats, feature cards, comparisons, glossary, FAQ, and section copy fragments used across multiple routes.
","created_at":"2026-03-04T19:04:23Z"},{"id":55,"issue_id":"bd-ty7.4","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"# Decomposition rationale\nContent beads are organized by narrative layer: hero framing, reusable data models, onboarding workflows, interface-surface deep dives, and support/reference material. This supports incremental quality review and makes copy ownership clear.\n\n# Truth policy\nNo major claim should survive without evidence in the traceability matrix. If wording cannot be supported by source evidence, wording must change.
","created_at":"2026-03-04T19:04:43Z"}]}
-{"id":"bd-ty7.4.1","title":"Author hero narrative and top-of-page value proposition","description":"Write opening narrative blocks that explain the core problem, why Agent Mail exists, and why the Rust rewrite matters, with concise proof-oriented framing.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-04T19:02:09.487387787Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-04T23:04:29.398005627Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-ty7.4.1","depends_on_id":"bd-ty7.1.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-04T19:03:48.579345028Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ty7.4.1","depends_on_id":"bd-ty7.1.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-04T19:03:48.790435716Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ty7.4.1","depends_on_id":"bd-ty7.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-04T19:02:09.487387787Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":22,"issue_id":"bd-ty7.4.1","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"# Content goals
- Immediate clarity on problem/solution.
- High-signal summary of differentiators.
- Credible proof cues (stress tests, adoption, workflow realism).

# Acceptance
Hero content is compelling, accurate, and traceable to repository evidence.
","created_at":"2026-03-04T19:02:09Z"}]}
+{"id":"bd-ty7.4.1","title":"Author hero narrative and top-of-page value proposition","description":"Write opening narrative blocks that explain the core problem, why Agent Mail exists, and why the Rust rewrite matters, with concise proof-oriented framing.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-04T19:02:09.487387787Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-04T23:08:43.283178374Z","closed_at":"2026-03-04T23:08:43.283159950Z","close_reason":"Reauthored homepage hero narrative/value proposition and implemented dashboard video placeholder centerpiece","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-ty7.4.1","depends_on_id":"bd-ty7.1.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-04T19:03:48.579345028Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ty7.4.1","depends_on_id":"bd-ty7.1.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-04T19:03:48.790435716Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ty7.4.1","depends_on_id":"bd-ty7.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-04T19:02:09.487387787Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":22,"issue_id":"bd-ty7.4.1","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"# Content goals
- Immediate clarity on problem/solution.
- High-signal summary of differentiators.
- Credible proof cues (stress tests, adoption, workflow realism).

# Acceptance
Hero content is compelling, accurate, and traceable to repository evidence.
","created_at":"2026-03-04T19:02:09Z"},{"id":143,"issue_id":"bd-ty7.4.1","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Implemented homepage hero narrative and top-of-page value proposition shift from Asupersync framing to Agent Mail framing.

## Content changes

- Rewrote hero badge/title/body copy in `app/page.tsx` to emphasize:
  - multi-agent coordination pain
  - project-scoped identity + threaded inbox + reservation guardrails
  - Git + SQLite audit/query model
- Updated primary hero CTA language to Agent Mail action framing.
- Replaced old architecture SVG centerpiece with a **dashboard video placeholder module** (as requested):
  - video shell with controls + muted/inline behavior
  - poster fallback asset
  - explicit replacement path instruction for future recording swap-in
- Updated hero HUD/status card copy from runtime-specific terminology to Agent Mail evidence cues.

## Proof-oriented cues added

- Updated `heroStats` in `lib/content.ts` to Agent Mail evidence metrics:
  - MCP tools count
  - resources count
  - stress gauntlet summary
  - throughput baseline cue

## Assets

- Added poster placeholder asset:
  - `public/images/agent-mail-dashboard-poster-placeholder.svg`

## Validation

- `bun lint` ✅
- `bun tsc --noEmit` ✅
- `bun run build` ✅
","created_at":"2026-03-04T23:08:43Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-ty7.4.10","title":"Author transcript, captions, and chapter metadata for hero demo narrative","description":"Define transcript/caption/chapter metadata for the centerpiece demo, including fallback copy for no-video contexts and accessibility-aligned text variants that preserve marketing clarity.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-04T22:10:03.658991001Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-04T22:10:27.850171817Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-ty7.4.10","depends_on_id":"bd-ty7.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-04T22:10:03.658991001Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ty7.4.10","depends_on_id":"bd-ty7.4.7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-04T22:10:27.850114851Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ty7.4.10","depends_on_id":"bd-ty7.4.9","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-04T22:10:27.667087196Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-ty7.4.11","title":"Author social-proof and credibility modules grounded in verifiable evidence","description":"Produce credibility content modules (evidence-backed claims, testimonials/snippets, reliability highlights, adoption-ready messaging) tied to traceable sources so marketing remains persuasive and factual.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-04T22:10:03.865851299Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-04T22:10:28.432813483Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-ty7.4.11","depends_on_id":"bd-ty7.1.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-04T22:10:28.237313145Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ty7.4.11","depends_on_id":"bd-ty7.1.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-04T22:10:28.432770353Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ty7.4.11","depends_on_id":"bd-ty7.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-04T22:10:03.865851299Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ty7.4.11","depends_on_id":"bd-ty7.4.8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-04T22:10:28.044196431Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-ty7.4.12","title":"Define demo-media asset packaging and replacement compatibility spec","description":"Define a strict media packaging spec for the landing centerpiece replacement workflow: supported codecs/containers, bitrate and resolution targets, poster-frame generation, caption/transcript sidecar formats, filename conventions, and validation checklist so user-provided dashboard recordings swap in without regressions.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-04T22:14:53.496470788Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-04T22:15:30.022855524Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-ty7.4.12","depends_on_id":"bd-ty7.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-04T22:14:53.496470788Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ty7.4.12","depends_on_id":"bd-ty7.4.10","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-04T22:15:17.108694952Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ty7.4.12","depends_on_id":"bd-ty7.4.7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-04T22:15:16.731640679Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ty7.4.12","depends_on_id":"bd-ty7.4.9","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-04T22:15:16.913544418Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":112,"issue_id":"bd-ty7.4.12","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"# Why this bead exists\nUser will supply a real dashboard recording later; this bead formalizes the exact packaging contract so replacement is deterministic, performant, and accessible across devices/browsers.\n\n# Acceptance intent\nSpec includes codec/container guidance, bitrate/resolution envelope, poster-generation rules, caption/transcript sidecars, and an explicit validation checklist consumed by implementation and E2E beads.","created_at":"2026-03-04T22:15:30Z"}]}
